headline: Entry assist surfaces now expire stale memory and follow a calmer priority order.
notes: Added freshness expiry for start-path memory and reading history so old resume prompts age out automatically.
Prioritized entry-assist surfaces so first-run, reading-history, quick-resume, and start-path recall no longer stack at once.
Fixed release-check reset handlers and added a one-click reset for the full entry-assist state.
Expanded release-check reporting with memory age/freshness and current entry-assist priority.
